impact: This advances the PP&D plan by committing a deterministic public fixture that keeps legal/procedural requirements distinct from DevHub operational UI behavior while preserving source evidence IDs, requirement type, confidence, and review-needed flags.
summary: Add a fixture-only PP&D requirement-boundary sample and validation test for one public permit process.
target_task: Task checkbox-103: Task checkbox-98: Add a fixture-only public PP&D requirement-boundary sample that separates legal or procedural obligations from operational DevHub UI behavior for one permit process, preserving source evidence IDs, requirement type, confidence, and review-needed flags.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
